name: Job Card
query:
SELECT 
name AS "Name:Data:250" , 
customer_name AS "Customer Name:Data:250", 
device_type AS "Device Type:Link/Device Type:250", 
status AS "Status:Data:250",
assigned_technician AS "Assigned Technician:Link/Technician:250", 
estimated_cost AS "Estimated Cost:Currency:250"
FROM `tabJob Card`
WHERE status NOT IN ("Delivered","Cancelled")
AND (IFNULL(%(device_type)s,'') = '' OR device_type = %(device_type)s)
ORDER BY customer_name
